title: [ExportVerilog] Indenting/formatting wrong after macro def
body:
Input:

```
sv.macro.decl @TEST_COND

hw.module @TestCond() {
  sv.ifdef "TEST_COND_" {
   sv.macro.def @TEST_COND "TEST_COND_"
  } else {
   sv.macro.def @TEST_COND "1"
  }
  hw.output
}
```

Current output:

```
// Generated by CIRCT 1.42.0g20230517_6043aa4
module TestCond();	// macro.mlir:3:1
  `ifdef TEST_COND_	// macro.mlir:4:3
    `define TEST_COND TEST_COND_
    `else  // TEST_COND_
    `define TEST_COND 1
    `endif // TEST_COND_
endmodule
```

Should be:
```
module TestCond();	// macro.mlir:3:1
  `ifdef TEST_COND_	// macro.mlir:4:3
    `define TEST_COND TEST_COND_
  `else  // TEST_COND_
    `define TEST_COND 1
  `endif // TEST_COND_
endmodule
```
